name: Sky Century Investment, Inc.
summary: PART I . General Background of the Company The Company was incorporated in the state of Nevada as Band Rep Management, Inc., a for-profit entity on May 4, 2012. The Company was renamed to the Sky Century Investment, Inc. on December 15, 2015. On February 29, 2020, Sky Century Investment, Inc. acquired the complete proprietorship of Cannabis News LLC, a business situated at 30 N Gould St, Ste R, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA.
